title: tarenna uniflora
intro: Tarenna uniflora, also known as the single-flowered tarenna or golden bell, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tarenna uniflora include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections due to its antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Tarenna uniflora are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
